case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. SAMUEL TOOLE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF COUNSEL RE: 1) INTEREST 2) COSTS (CCP 1033) 3) ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOOLE, SAMUEL $1,282.83 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,566.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TOOLE, SAMUEL
